rationale: PDF p.461 'CDISC Patent Disclaimers' bold L3 heading directly under L2 §10.F Appendix F. heading_level=3 sibling_index=1 first L3 child correct.
PDF p.1 bottom italic 'See Appendix A for Representations and Warranties, Limitations of Liability, and Disclaimers.' byte-exact match. SENTENCE on cover page; parent §0 [Cover] correct.
PDF p.2 TOC '3.1.2 The Events Observation Class........15' dot-leader exact. CROSS_REF type appropriate for TOC entry. parent §0 [TOC] correct.
PDF p.3 TOC 'APPENDIX A: REPRESENTATIONS AND WARRANTIES, LIMITATIONS OF LIABILITY, AND DISCLAIMERS .....74' byte-exact. CROSS_REF + §0 [TOC] correct.

PDF p.4 §1.2 lead sentence 'The SDTM has been designed to accommodate the broadest range of human and animal study data in a standardized manner.' byte-exact. parent §1 [INTRODUCTION] consistent with sibling §1.2 lead atoms.

PDF p.5 §1.4 second-paragraph sentence byte-exact. parent §1 [INTRODUCTION] (vs sibling-pivoted §1.4 used by a011+); soft drift — defensible since atom sits in §1.4 lead paragraph before any L3 child header.
PDF p.6 bullet 'Section 3.1.3, The Findings Observation Class' byte-exact. LIST_ITEM under §1.4 'New variables have been added' bullet group. parent §1.4 correct.
PDF p.7 only sentence: 'A number of changes are proposed for the next version of the SDTM. See Section 8...' byte-exact. parent §1.4 correct (last orphan sentence before §2 on p.8).

PDF p.8 §2 paragraph fragment matches text. Soft PARTIAL on verbatim: PDF uses curly quotes around 'Subject 101 had an adverse event of mild nausea starting on study day 6'; atom verbatim normalizes to straight quotes. No semantic loss; consistent with batch 1-46 quote-normalization pattern.

PDF p.9 §2.1 bullet 'Synonym Qualifiers...' byte-exact. parent §2 [MODEL CONCEPTS...] should arguably be §2.1 since L2 sub-heading active at p.9 top. Systemic L2-skip drift across all sv20_p0009 a002-a019. Logged as O-P1-166 candidate.
